Quantum Construction & Design, 3646 W Slauson Ave, Los Angeles, CA (Employee: Willie Rodriguez Griffin) holds a General Building license according to the California license board.
Their BuildZoom score of 89 does not rank in the top 50% of California contractors.
Their license was verified as active when we last checked. If you are thinking of hiring Quantum Construction & Design, we recommend double-checking their license status with the license board and using our project planner to get competitive quotes.

Quantum Construction & Design Reviews
1 out of 5 stars, based on
1
review
-
By Sushant G.April 6, 2021Kitchen Remodelig$4,000Read more
Very sloppy third class job.. over delayed my project.. Willie kept on giving me excuses.
Willie is a third class Guy, he will cut corners wherever possible. He didn't even put plastic on my appliances beige starting working, he just started demolition without any covering. All my appliances and blinds are full of dirt and dust. He doesn't considers customer home to be his own home, rather a money churning machine.
He treated my House as an abandoned house.
He started the project on February 24th and finished it in March 17th 2021 and that was after threatening him lots of times. The kitchen floor is sloppy.. it's not straight. He once said he will rip off the whole kitchen ground and redo it, later he changed his mind. He sent two jokers at my house, who used to come at 12 pm, take one hour lunch and then used to leave at 3 pm. It seemed they were here on a picnic. They were not serious about work. My AC intake got chocked from the smoke of powder all over the place when the tiles were taken out. Willie or his workers never told me that I need to shut my AC off as it sucks the smoke powder from the work being done. I had to replace my AC Filter five Times. And lots of powder still went inside my intake, it might damage my central
AC in the long run. Willie"s workers blew one of my Electric line. When I told Willie about it he never took the responsibility to
Get it fixed. On the contrary he blamed me for
It, so I had to pay $400 to get it fixed. Willie didn't realize that for 21 days all of the kitchen stuff was in my room and I was eating outside. Even after so many days the work is still not complete. He forgot to put a divider in one of the shelves, and this shouldn't have happened. I don't want to see Willie again and would never hire him again. I will have to get my kitchen redone from someone else now. So all this hassle for 21 days and loosing so much money was not worth it. The whole kitchen and my belongings in the kitchen are full of powder smoke, and it will take me 7-8 days to clean the kitchen. I have no idea how Willie got other 5 star reviews. His work
Is totally sloppy, he keeps on forgetting things he is supposed to do, is unprofessional, I had to remind him several
Times what needs to be done and what not. He behaves like a kid who doesn't know what he is doing. He was never involved in the kitchen remodeling. He never advised me on anything regarding kitchen. He just used to send his joker workers to work at my
House. So many days the workers didn't even show up. I wish I would have hired someone else.He just used the old cabinet doors and drawer covers to put it back on the cabinets, who knows where they were lying for so many days. It seems Willie threw them in the garbage from last many
Days and just brought them back from the garbage. I have skin problems and that is aggravating my skin problems, I cannot stand in the kitchen right now. Plus he was supposed to get new cabinets, he never told me that he will use the old door and old drawer covers back on the cabinets.He doesn't provide any list of what should I do before doing the construction, like taking out my food items from the shelf or covering my electronics. In fact on his third day of work his workers continued to the work without sticking the single plastic curtain they sticked on the first two days of their work. I have tenants in the house, and I had to go personally everyday to clean and vacuum their rooms. The white tile powder was all over the place. If you don't have a stern personality and cannot threat the contractor then your work would never be complete. Willie is just interested in money, his work is not detailed, he lies a lot, he will say you one day that he will show up with his workers next day but he never arrives, he just send his workers when he should be with them
To supervise their work. His workers just come over as a formality to complete the job and do not have any experience of doing the job.Willie is lying about I asked for discount, it was him who offered discount for a 5 star review(see picture on google reviews)
